description: Use this API to specify or return the maximum number of levels to go outward when isolating an element by breaker. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr = isolate_levels(ival, iocode)

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 4 by default; else output).

parameters.name: iocode
parameters.description: Indicates the operation mode of the api. (input; no default allowed).

iocode.description: set the option setting to the value specified in IVAL.
return the current value of the option setting in IVAL.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
